analysis.reasoning: Core message: The tweet praises Qinqiang Opera as an ancient art form from the Qin Dynasty, calling it the forefather of Chinese opera and highlighting its preservation into modern times. Evaluation: CH1 (West immoral/hostile): Not referenced; no comparison with the West. CH2 (China benevolent power): No mention of international cooperation or global role. CH3 (China has an epic history): It highlights long historical continuity and legacy of Chinese culture; while not about adversity or CCP, it clearly promotes the grandeur and depth of China's history. CH4 (appropriate political system/values): Not addressed. CH5 (CCP government succeeds): No governance or development claims. CH6 (China is interesting in culture/nature/heritage): Yes; it promotes traditional Chinese culture and heritage (Qinqiang Opera). Conclusion: Narratives CH3 and CH6 are promoted.
